title: Relic Hunters Legend
description: Large-scale online multiplayer shooter RPG. I acted as Tech Lead and Full Stack Developer, working from the Node.js and Docker backend to the Unity C# frontend.

title: Crisálida
description:
Responsible for system architecture and data centralization via ScriptableObjects.

Developed custom tools for the Unity Editor to optimize design workflow and parameter validation.

title: Save the Bloogs
description:
Mobile platformer game where I developed with a focus on scalable architecture and performance.

Implemented hardware integration via custom SDK, build automation (CI/CD), and automated tests using the Unity Test Framework.

title: Slash Quest & The Dreadful Island
description: Worked as a freelance developer on publicly funded projects, focusing on structuring modular mechanics and consistent gameplay components using Unity and C#.

title: Profane
description: Sandbox MMORPG focused on high performance. Developed features using Unity DOTS (Data-Oriented Technology Stack) to ensure scalability and memory optimization.

title: Pingoal
description: 2D mobile platformer game with puzzle elements. Responsible for technical leadership, integration of hardware SDKs, and build pipeline automation (CI/CD).

title: Camera Punk Di-SK8
description:
Development of complex photography mechanics and state-based NPC systems (FSM).

Implemented camera management (1st and 3rd person) focused on fluid transitions and performance.

title: PROACOINS
description: Maintenance and optimization of a mobile application. Performed code refactoring (Clean Code), implemented asynchronous communication with external APIs via UnityWebRequest, and managed the publishing process on Google Play.

title: Tika Books
description:
Interactive reading app developed in Unity.

Implemented an audio recording system synchronized with page-turning animations, integrated with a backend API via UnityWebRequest. Conducted a complete UI refactoring and implemented custom animation plugins.

title: Embedded Systems & Casino
description:
Development of games for embedded software in Linux.

Automated project configuration processes with Shell Script and managed complex asset architectures.

title: Caritas Management System
description: Complete management system (CRUD) developed as a Full Stack Developer for optimizing internal processes.

title: Instagram Filter - Manual Produtora
description:
Development of an interactive Instagram filter using Meta Spark Studio.

Applied programming logic in a low-code environment and game engine concepts for creating dynamic behaviors.

title: Interactive Roulette - Sakura Tourism
description:
Custom development of interactive roulette software for brand activation in promotional events.

Complete implementation in Unity of raffle mechanics, visual effects, sound design, and display architecture for multiple monitors (audience screen and operator configuration panel).
